name: Happy Path
tagline: Selenium-style happy path clickthrough tests for all 216labs apps
description: Periodically runs common-sense browser tests against each deployed app: load homepage, follow first sensible link, assert no crash. Reports pass/fail per app on a status dashboard.

env_vars.description: How often to run tests in hours (default: 6)
Path to 216labs.db to read enabled apps (optional, for local dev)
